title: AI Garden Learning Cohort
topic: learner needs, lesson generation, exercises, and outcome review
skill_description: Assess learner progress, generate useful AI lessons, assign exercises, and review measurable outcomes.
review_reason: keeper reviews skill gap fit, exercise clarity, safety, and measurable outcome
quality_rules: Every output must name learner level, skill gap, exercise, and measurable outcome.
Do not create vague lessons without practice and review.
Safety and age appropriateness must be explicit when relevant.
skill_rules: Prefer small project-based exercises over abstract explanations.
Return misunderstood concepts as follow-up questions.

participants.title: Learner Needs Desk
participants.perspective: A useful lesson begins with the learner's current confusion and goal.
participants.current_question: Which skill gap should the next lesson target?
participants.contribution: Provides learner level, goal, misconceptions, and constraints.

participants.title: Lesson Builder Desk
participants.perspective: AI education needs concrete examples and tasks that produce visible artifacts.
participants.current_question: What smallest lesson can create a useful artifact?
participants.contribution: Provides lesson outline, example, resource, and artifact goal.

participants.title: Practice Review Desk
participants.perspective: Learning sticks when practice is reviewed against clear criteria.
participants.current_question: How should the learner prove the skill improved?
participants.contribution: Provides exercise rubric, review questions, and next practice step.
